title: Link

field_metadata.description: Title used to organize the content within the CMS.
Destination link when clicked. Supports internal pages or external URLs.

error_messages.format: The url must be a valid URL or relative Path

field_metadata.description: Whether to open the link in a new browser tab or not.
Content that becomes clickable (images, text, or other components).

description: A clickable link that can wrap around other content (like images or text). Use this to make entire sections clickable, not just buttons.
